assertions.reason: Current builtin loading still includes the todowrite extension exactly once with no load errors for that builtin.
evidence: Repo-local tsx runtime check against DefaultResourceLoader.reload() reported builtinTodowriteCount=1 and builtinTodowriteErrors=[] with builtinPaths including '<builtin:todowrite>'.
Source registration still preserves the builtin id in packages/coding-agent/src/core/extensions/builtin/index.ts as { id: 'todowrite', factory: todowriteExtension }.

assertions.reason: The refactored todowrite tool still preserves replace semantics, JSON output shape, and empty-array acceptance end-to-end through the faux provider harness.
evidence: Focused vitest run passed test/suite/todowrite-extension.test.ts including 'stores the complete todo list and returns JSON output'.
The same run passed 'replaces the entire todo list instead of merging entries' and 'allows replacing the todo list with an empty array'.
Vitest summary: 2 files passed, 8 tests passed, exit code 0.

assertions.reason: The refactored todoread tool returns the latest todos with the expected details/content shape.
evidence: Focused vitest run passed test/suite/todowrite-extension.test.ts case 'reads the latest todos through the agent-facing todoread tool'.
The test asserts result.details deep-equals the latest todos and result.content[0].text equals JSON.stringify(todos, null, 2).

assertions.reason: Both session_start and session_tree rebuild todo state from branch entries and re-render the todo-sidebar widget with the helper-produced lines.
evidence: Repo-local tsx runtime check invoked the registered session_start handler on a SessionManager containing a sanepi.todo-state custom entry and observed setWidget('todo-sidebar', ['Todo', '[ ] Custom todo']).
The same runtime check invoked session_tree on a SessionManager containing a todowrite toolResult entry and observed setWidget('todo-sidebar', ['Todo', '[•] Tool todo']).

packages/coding-agent/src/core/extensions/builtin/todotools/index.ts routes both handlers through syncFromSession(), which assigns getLatestTodosFromBranchEntries(ctx.sessionManager.getBranch()) before calling ctx.ui.setWidget('todo-sidebar', getTodoWidgetLines(currentTodos)).

assertions.reason: before_agent_start still appends the task-management section exactly as `${original}\n${TASK_MANAGEMENT_SECTION}` and the literal matches the committed golden fixture byte-for-byte.
evidence: Repo-local tsx runtime check invoked the registered before_agent_start handler and observed beforeAgentStartMatches=true for input systemPrompt='BASE'.

Focused vitest run passed test/suite/task-management-section.test.ts, which compares Buffer.from(TASK_MANAGEMENT_SECTION, 'utf8') against test/suite/fixtures/task-management-section.txt byte-for-byte.
packages/coding-agent/src/core/extensions/builtin/todotools/index.ts returns { systemPrompt: `${event.systemPrompt}\n${TASK_MANAGEMENT_SECTION}` }.

assertions.reason: Widget sidebar helper behavior is preserved, including marker formatting and sanitization; the empty/all-completed undefined behavior is still present in source.
evidence: Focused vitest run passed test/suite/todowrite-extension.test.ts cases 'builds sidebar widget lines from the current todo state' and 'sanitizes todo widget output before rendering'.
That test asserts ['Todo', '[•] Active task', '[✓] Done task', '[ ] Queued task'] and ['Todo', '[ ] Unsafe text next line'] exactly.
packages/coding-agent/src/core/extensions/builtin/todotools/state.ts returns undefined when todos.length === 0 or when no todo has status !== 'completed'.

assertions.reason: Result-line helper still reports open-count first and preserves the same marker/sanitized formatting for each todo.
evidence: Focused vitest run passed test/suite/todowrite-extension.test.ts assertion expect(getTodoResultLines(todos)).toEqual(['2 todos', '[•] Active task', '[✓] Done task', '[ ] Queued task']).
packages/coding-agent/src/core/extensions/builtin/todotools/state.ts still implements getTodoResultLines() using countOpenTodos(todos) followed by the marker + sanitized content mapping.

assertions.reason: The entry type literal is unchanged and branch reconstruction still handles both custom todo-state entries and todowrite toolResult entries, with [] returned when no matching entry is found.
evidence: Repo-local tsx runtime check imported TODO_STATE_ENTRY_TYPE='sanepi.todo-state' and confirmed getLatestTodosFromBranchEntries() reconstructed toolResult-backed todos as branchToolTodos=[{content:'Tool todo',status:'in_progress',priority:'medium'}].
Focused vitest run passed test/suite/todowrite-extension.test.ts case 'reconstructs todo state from branch-specific custom entries', including a root branch assertion returning [].

packages/coding-agent/src/core/extensions/builtin/todotools/state.ts explicitly updates from custom entries whose customType === TODO_STATE_ENTRY_TYPE and from message entries whose role === 'toolResult' and toolName === 'todowrite'.

assertions.reason: The new todotools entry module exports the required public symbols from a single stable specifier and loads without import errors.
evidence: Repo-local tsx runtime import from packages/coding-agent/src/core/extensions/builtin/todotools/index.ts reported exportedSymbols = { TODO_STATE_ENTRY_TYPE: 'sanepi.todo-state', getLatestTodosFromBranchEntries: 'function', getTodoWidgetLines: 'function', getTodoResultLines: 'function' }.

packages/coding-agent/src/core/extensions/builtin/todotools/index.ts re-exports TASK_MANAGEMENT_SECTION plus TODO_STATE_ENTRY_TYPE, getLatestTodosFromBranchEntries, getTodoWidgetLines, and getTodoResultLines from the folder entrypoint.

assertions.reason: The task-management section is guarded by a committed golden snapshot test and the fixture exists under the suite fixtures directory.
evidence: Focused vitest run passed test/suite/task-management-section.test.ts ('TASK_MANAGEMENT_SECTION golden snapshot').

The test reads packages/coding-agent/test/suite/fixtures/task-management-section.txt and compares its bytes to TASK_MANAGEMENT_SECTION from packages/coding-agent/src/core/extensions/builtin/todotools/prompt.js.
Directory inspection confirmed packages/coding-agent/test/suite/fixtures/task-management-section.txt exists in the committed test suite.

frictions.description: A targeted broader check of test/resource-loader.test.ts is stale: the specific case 'should assign stable builtin identifiers to builtin extension factories' still expects only todowrite/redraws, while current runtime loads six builtins including <builtin:todowrite> exactly once.
frictions.resolution: Used a direct repo-local DefaultResourceLoader runtime check instead; it confirmed builtinTodowriteCount=1 and builtinTodowriteErrors=[].

summary: Validated 10 assigned refactor assertions. Focused Vitest coverage passed (2 files, 8 tests), and supplemental repo-local runtime checks confirmed builtin loading, event wiring, handler prompt appending, toolResult branch reconstruction, and public exports.
